Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Order Establishing Effective Date Of Filing Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GARY ZIEROTH'S Motion For Order Establishing Effective Date Of Filing Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order establishing effective date of filing complaint" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
